docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-14-2025 CONTINUED TO APR-15-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALGUERO, FERNANDO $6,186.57 PRINCIPAL, $301.02 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,487.59, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75483438)
